title: platanus vulgaris var. flabellifolia
intro: Platanus vulgaris var. flabellifolia, commonly known as the weeping plane or London planetree, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Platanaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its bark, which contains triterpenes and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Platanus vulgaris var. flabellifolia include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antipruritic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to create medicinal products that take advantage of its various health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
